message: Merging branches for Implement Interrogator Module, Develop AI Respondent, Create Human-Proxy Respondent, and Design Evaluation Mechanism.
objective: Build a Python-based Turing Test Machine. It should have a module for a simulated 'interrogator' and two modules for 'respondents' (one AI, one human-proxy). The machine should evaluate the interrogator's guesses.

tasks.title: Implement Interrogator Module
tasks.description: Develop the module that interacts with both the AI and Human-Proxy Respondents. It should be capable of initiating dialogue sessions, recording conversation history, and submitting guesses about each respondent's identity.

tasks.title: Develop AI Respondent
tasks.description: Create the AI Respondent module that generates human-like responses. It should maintain the context of the conversation to ensure coherent dialogue.

tasks.title: Create Human-Proxy Respondent
tasks.description: Develop the Human-Proxy Respondent module to simulate human behaviors and responses.

tasks.title: Design Evaluation Mechanism
tasks.description: Develop the evaluation mechanism to assess the accuracy of the interrogator’s guesses, calculate the success rate, and provide feedback for improving future iterations.
